name: Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and shortening.
2. Add the pumpkin, eggs, and vanilla. Beat well.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients, spices, flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Add the sifted mixture to the creamed mixture; beat well.
5. Stir in the raisins and chopped nuts.
6. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet, about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 - 15 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes.
9. Frost with icing.
Icing:
Mix all ingredients together until smooth. Spread over cooled cookies. Can be made ahead of time and kept in the refrigerator.
